assert_StrictlyIncreasing.message:
Assertion failed: StrictlyIncreasing — \A i \in 1..(Len(section_order) - 1) :
        section_order[i] < section_order[i + 1]
assert_StrictlyIncreasing.description: Test assertion for StrictlyIncreasing from ContextStackRanking spec

assert_ValidRanks.description: Test assertion for ValidRanks from ContextStackRanking spec

assert_NoDuplicates.condition:
\A i in 1..Len(section_order) :
    \A j in 1..Len(section_order) :
        i # j implies section_order[i] # section_order[j]
assert_NoDuplicates.message:
Assertion failed: NoDuplicates — \A i \in 1..Len(section_order) :
    \A j \in 1..Len(section_order) :
        i # j => section_order[i] # section_ord...
assert_NoDuplicates.description: Test assertion for NoDuplicates from ContextStackRanking spec

assert_SimTracesFirst.condition:
built implies
        ((has_sim_traces and Len(section_order) >= 1) implies section_order[1] = 1)
assert_SimTracesFirst.message:
Assertion failed: SimTracesFirst — built =>
        ((has_sim_traces /\ Len(section_order) >= 1) => section_order[1] = 1)
assert_SimTracesFirst.description: Test assertion for SimTracesFirst from ContextStackRanking spec

assert_Rank5Always.description: Test assertion for Rank5Always from ContextStackRanking spec

assert_FallbackIff.description: Test assertion for FallbackIff from ContextStackRanking spec

assert_TypeOK.condition:
and has_sim_traces     in BOOLEAN
    and has_api_context    in BOOLEAN
    and has_verifiers      in BOOLEAN
    and has_tla_spec       in BOOLEAN
    and has_test_scenarios in BOOLEAN
    and fallback_appended  in BOOLEAN
    and built              in BOOLEAN
    and \A i in 1..Len(section_order) : section_order[i] in 1..5
assert_TypeOK.message:
Assertion failed: TypeOK — /\ has_sim_traces     \in BOOLEAN
    /\ has_api_context    \in BOOLEAN
    /\ has_verifiers      \in BOOLEAN
    /\ ...
assert_TypeOK.description: Test assertion for TypeOK from ContextStackRanking spec

assert_OrderingInvariant.condition:
built implies
        and StrictlyIncreasing
        and ValidRanks
        and NoDuplicates
        and SimTracesFirst
        and Rank1Iff
        and Rank2Iff
        and Rank3Iff
        and Rank4Iff
        and Rank5Always
        and FallbackIff
assert_OrderingInvariant.message:
Assertion failed: OrderingInvariant — built =>
        /\ StrictlyIncreasing
        /\ ValidRanks
        /\ NoDuplicates
        /\ SimTracesFirst
      ...
assert_OrderingInvariant.description: Test assertion for OrderingInvariant from ContextStackRanking spec

assert_GWTInvariant.condition:
built implies
        and (has_sim_traces implies section_order[1] = 1)
        and (has_api_context implies
                \E i in 1..Len(section_order) :
                    and section_order[i] = 2
                    and (~has_sim_traces or i > 1))
        and (has_verifiers implies
                \E i in 1..Len(section_order) :
                    and section_order[i] = 3
                    and (~has_api_context or \E j in 1..(i-1) : section_order[j] = 2))
        and (has_tla_spec implies
                \E i in 1..Len(section_order) :
                    and section_order[i] = 4
                    and (~has_verifiers or \E j in 1..(i-1) : section_order[j] = 3))
        and (\E i in 1..Len(section_order) :
                and section_order[i] = 5
                and (~has_tla_spec or \E j in 1..(i-1) : section_order[j] = 4))
assert_GWTInvariant.message:
Assertion failed: GWTInvariant — built =>
        /\ (has_sim_traces => section_order[1] = 1)
        /\ (has_api_context =>
                \E i \in ...
assert_GWTInvariant.description: Test assertion for GWTInvariant from ContextStackRanking spec
